creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
I've attached a diff of a few changes I think will be beneficial.

-Trim Makefile header
- Use DIST_SUBDIR since distfiles are not versioned
- Use native libraries by default
- Install icon in ${PREFIX}/share/pixmaps
- Fix typo in JAVA_VENDOR
- Use ${XARGS} and ${RM} instead of the hardcoded ones
- Clean up whitespace to make Makefile more readable
- Use %%DATADIR%% in pkg-plist

Please let me know if you approve and I will commit it.
-- 
Jason E. Hale - jhale@
FreeBSD Ports Committer
KDE/FreeBSD Team
